security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; media-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Tactical Codec simulator and Side Ops 2D mission suite.
bundle.longDescription: Shadow Codec Ops combines a multi-era tactical Codec simulator, connected Campaign Ops progression, branching campaign authoring, Side Ops missions, VR training, tape archives, lore database and creation tools.
